CheckTitle: 检查RDS Instances events are subscribed.
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks, AWS Security Best Practices
Description: 确保Amazon RDS event notification subscriptions已启用 for 数据库 数据库 events, particularly maintenance, configuration change and failure.
Risk: 如果没有事件订阅s for critical events, such as maintenance, 配置变更 and failures, you may not be aware of issues affecting your RDS 实例s, leading to downtime or 安全漏洞.

Recommendation.Text: To subscribe to RDS 实例 event notifications, see Subscribing to Amazon RDS event notification in the Amazon RDS User Guide.
